name: react-hook-form
summary: Performant, flexible and extensible forms library for React Hooks

story.problem: Controlled forms in React — where every input is tied to state with onChange — cause a re-render on every keystroke. A form with 10 fields re-renders 10 times per character typed. For complex forms with validation, this tanks performance. React Hook Form uses uncontrolled inputs and the ref model to avoid re-renders.
story.mental_model: Instead of storing form values in React state, React Hook Form stores them in a ref (outside React's render cycle). You register each input with a register() function, which attaches the ref. Validation runs on submit or blur, not on every keystroke. Re-renders only happen when validation errors change or the form is submitted.
story.when_to_use: Use React Hook Form for any form with more than 3-4 fields, especially if they have validation logic. It integrates well with Zod (via @hookform/resolvers/zod) for schema-based validation, giving you type-safe forms with runtime validation in a few lines.
story.when_not_to_use: For very simple single-field forms (a search box, a newsletter signup), useState is less code. For highly dynamic forms where fields are added/removed programmatically, the useFieldArray API works but adds complexity — evaluate Formik for that use case.

alternatives.name: formik
alternatives.reason: Older, more opinionated form library; controlled by default but has a larger ecosystem of examples

alternatives.name: tanstack-form
alternatives.reason: Framework-agnostic form library from the React Query author — newer but with strong TypeScript support

nodes.label: react-hook-form
nodes.summary: Import from 'react-hook-form'. Uncontrolled form validation library.

nodes.label: useForm(options)
nodes.summary: Core hook. Returns { register, handleSubmit, watch, formState, setValue, getValues, reset, control }.

nodes.label: register(name, rules)
nodes.summary: Connect an input to the form. Returns { ref, onChange, onBlur, name }. Supports validation rules.

nodes.label: handleSubmit(onValid, onInvalid)
nodes.summary: Wraps form onSubmit. Validates first; calls onValid(data) on success.

nodes.label: formState
nodes.summary: { errors, isSubmitting, isValid, isDirty, dirtyFields, touchedFields }.

nodes.label: Controller
nodes.summary: Wrapper for controlled components (Select, DatePicker, etc.) that don't use native inputs.

nodes.label: useWatch() / watch()
nodes.summary: Subscribe to field value changes. useWatch is more performant (targeted re-render).

nodes.label: Schema Resolvers (Zod, Yup, Joi)
nodes.summary: Pass resolver to useForm for schema validation: `resolver: zodResolver(schema)`. Auto-maps errors.

nodes.label: useFieldArray()
nodes.summary: Manage dynamic arrays of fields: append, prepend, remove, move, swap.
